_note: Chapter 4 — the Mitchell extraction, Arizona. Site prep -> dawn signal -> crash -> escape.

c4_bunker.name: Command Bunker
c4_bunker.desc: A buried room lit by console glow: site schematics, comm gear, Conroy's voice on a secure line whenever it suits him. The air tastes of concrete and old fear. Everything is planned. That's what worries you.

c4_mall.name: Dead Mall Concourse
c4_mall.desc: A shopping mall the desert has been eating for fifty years. Sand drifts through shattered skylights across the food court. Your team moves through the ruins like ghosts with clipboards.

c4_perimeter.name: Perimeter — The Wire
c4_perimeter.desc: Sensor stakes and monofilament out to the highway, the mesa a black wall on the horizon. Sutcliffe walks the line with his rifle slung, pointing out arcs of fire like a man showing you his garden.

c4_ridge.name: Ridge Lookout
c4_ridge.desc: From up here the site is a diagram of itself: bunker, pad, pod, wire. Webber sits against a rock with her scope, chewing a match, watching the team more than the desert.

c4_medpod.name: Surgical Pod
c4_medpod.desc: A mobile neurosurgery riding on a flatbed: white light, chrome, the smell of iodine and cold. The medicals check their instruments in silence. Whatever comes over the wire at dawn lands on this table first.

c4_pad.name: Landing Pad
c4_pad.desc: The jet crouches under camo netting, fueled, preflighted, pointed at the sky like a held breath. The exit. You've never trusted a plan whose exit you didn't pick yourself.

c4_crash.name: Crash Site
c4_crash.desc: The ultralight is a torn kite burning in the scrub. In the wreckage: not Christopher Mitchell. A girl — sixteen, unconscious, pulse thready, blood at her hairline. Behind you, over the mesa, the sky is starting to turn the wrong color.
c4_crash.locked_text: Nothing out there yet but desert and dark. The signal comes at dawn.

c4_jet.name: The Jet
c4_jet.desc: You strap the girl into the copilot couch as the first strike comes down on the site behind you — a white flower with a stem of smoke, your whole team inside it. The jet's AI asks, politely, where you would like to go.
c4_jet.locked_text: Not without what came over the wire.
